description_long: This object consists of several clusters of trailing, leafy green shrubs arranged in a staggered, layered fashion. The foliage is dense and appears to cascade downward, with some sections forming thick mats while others hang more loosely. The leaves are small, rounded to slightly oval, and closely packed along thin, flexible stems. The coloration ranges from deep green to lighter, yellow-green hues, suggesting a mix of healthy and slightly sun-exposed growth. The overall structure is airy, with visible gaps between the clusters, giving the impression of a decorative or ornamental shrub often used for vertical greening or wall planting. No flowers or fruits are visible, and the shrub appears well-suited for urban landscaping or as a feature in parks and public spaces.
description: A collection of cascading, leafy green shrubs with dense, trailing foliage and small, oval leaves, arranged in layered clusters. The coloration varies from deep to light green, and the structure is airy with visible gaps.
description_view_0: Multiple clusters of trailing green foliage are visible, with dense mats and cascading stems arranged in a staggered, layered pattern.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin, vertical profile of the shrub clusters, highlighting the trailing nature and the separation between each group.
description_view_2: Opposite angle to view 0, showing the same layered arrangement but from the other side, with the foliage clusters mirrored.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the vertical, trailing stems and the airy gaps between the clusters.
